title: potentilla × intercedens
intro: Potentilla × intercedens, a hybrid shrub, is a cross between Potentilla fruticosa and Potentilla nitida, known for its pink or white flowers and compact growth habit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Potentilla × intercedens include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
